reviews.review_description:
Update not appearing on the meta quest library and forced to sideload. Crashes on first boot and not syncing to account, including purchases in game.
Lost progress in version 51.

Forced to downgrade to version 44 as this works with account and able to restore data.

Unable to join version 51 users
for the price this might be the best horror game on vr also get a friend to play ts with you and you going to have a 100% good day
it’s an amazingly scary horror game for the price of a vending machine soda. (id recommend turning on Christ mode for the jumpscares)
May please add new levels
I had a blast playing this game it’s fun super scary and I would recommend playing I really think this game has potential this is a must if you love scary games!!
I gave the five stars for gameplay, there was a lot of effort put into it, but it truly saddens me to see that there is no one on the game.
Kinda laggy and buggy but scary and fun if you have friends also THERES a bug with meatworld where I get stiuck in the ship
I love this update I just can't work out what to do with the latest level, would help i think to hover and have more control 👏 💐

I played with my friend's we had really fun and I got jumpscared lol and I even told my other friend to buy this game because it's fun and yeah he said maybe                                             

good job whoever made this game

developer_response.body: Thank you a lot I spent months on it lol

reviews.review_description: Its Better than bb that’s why I must give it 5 stars

Your game is great I feel it needs sprinting and level three doesn’t fit the game and maybe you can have a built-in system where every single time you complete a mission you get experience and with experience, you can buy in game
 items such as maybe a gun where the gun can stun the monster and  a utility belt where you can holster the gun and holster, your flashlight ￼

On some rs VR has been getting boring but ever since I got this game on my Quest 2 it’s been fun. Horror on VR got trash a while ago but this and Crawlspace is what keeps me on, keep up the good work. ✌🏾💯

Its super scary and fun. I got so scared i even turned my volume all the way down but than i screamed when i saw the monster behind me
This is probably the best horror game I’ve ever played!!
I love the game but the computer never wants me to join a sever its annoying please fix it immediately
But my dad has cancer.

reviews.review_title: It was broken and didn’t let me get off
reviews.review_description: The game was very glitchy. I would fall through the map and it was very jittery. I also had to restart my headset to get off it.
This game is really good to play with friends and other people but I just wanna say to add more levels and sprinting to make it better!
this is one of my favorite vr games and its only has 2 lvls and it is nit too hard but not too scary but if your gonna play lvl 1 play it with someone else😭
It is so fun and scary so play it plssssss

This is one of the best horror games I ever played on vr, but it’s kinda strange because there is no walking animation and no crouch animation, and the character is so strange that I even got scared by my own friend while playing alone on a multiplayer server.

developer_response.body: sorry about the character animations lol, im just one person and im also doing college at the same time. But I will add them soon along with voice chat. THANKS FOR TRYING MY GAME!

reviews.review_description: So much fun level 3 is a masterpiece thx me and my friend love it
The graphics are horrible
Its difinetly creepy and the monster is unsettling
Very good game, monster looks like SCP 096 though, which makes it scary. Haven't finished the game because of how scared I get, but still I would really love multiplayer to make it more fun.

Ima give it a 4 star, here’s why, you can’t really run, it’s just a light jog or walk, and i feel like multiplayer should have came out on 500 download, which would boost this game’s efficiency and make it way better and more exciting to play.  Who don’t like playing scary games with there friends.  Also the computer is un functional and I don’t know if that’s a bug or js bc multiplayer hasn’t been set up yet, how ever this game is mad scary and I’ve already recorded videos of me playing which I shall be updating shortly👍🏾.
Very scary, only the strong willed, can beat it.
Where’s multiplayer man I need it🤓
Very good and very scary

reviews.review_title: I love this game I love this game
reviews.review_description: I really love this game really scary but when I first went down the elevator for my first time playing, I did not go in it ￼
Its pretty fun its kinda glitchy but me and my friends loved it its a good game
it is the best horror game i’ve seen and the monster it’s great but when you join there’s a glitch that you will spawn outside the map.But it’s still a very fun game.
The game is very scary and I love scary keep up the good work LETS GET 1k DOWNLOADS you guys should tell your friends about this game
This game is really good, it’s just a perfect amount of fun and horror, It is really scary. Would recommend.
